events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`, with the compliance decision based on the impulse-line installation condition described.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /app/answer.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 75,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.92,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"DP impulse lines are sloped and tapped opposite of service requirements, allowing gas or liquid pockets to collect in the sensing legs.\",
    \"Gas service taps installed below the pipe and liquid service taps installed on top do not follow standard transmitter installation practice or manufacturer guidance.\",
    \"As roughed in, the installation can cause biased or unstable differential pressure measurement and failed commissioning/quality gate inspection.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Reject the rough-complete installation at the quality gate.\",
    \"Rework process taps and impulse tubing orientation for the actual service: gas installations arranged to drain condensate away from the transmitter and liquid installations arranged to vent gas away from the sensing legs as required by the transmitter manufacturer and project details.\",
    \"Verify impulse-line slope, tap location, transmitter elevation, vent/drain provisions, and leg fill condition before pressure test, calibration, or loop acceptance.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The observed DP impulse line arrangement is the classic reversed orientation for gas and liquid service. API RP 551 and transmitter manufacturer manuals require impulse piping and taps to be arranged so trapped gas, condensate, or liquid pockets do not create measurement error. Because the defect is already installed at rough-complete and would compromise transmitter accuracy and commissioning, the work is non-compliant and must be reworked before closeout.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"API RP 551 - process measurement instrumentation installation guidance for differential pressure transmitters and impulse piping\",
    \"Manufacturer transmitter installation manuals - impulse line slope, tap orientation, vent/drain, and service-specific mounting requirements\"
  ]
}
EOF
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json >/dev/null"
